channel.title: Live cameras — Bolotnaya Square & Yakimanka on Bolotnaya Online — Yakimanka live cameras
channel.description: Recent content in Live cameras — Bolotnaya Square & Yakimanka on Bolotnaya Online — Yakimanka live cameras

item.title: Camera: Bolotnaya Square
item.description: Live HLS camera stream of Bolotnaya Square in Moscow’s Yakimanka district.
item.content:encoded: Live view of Bolotnaya Square. Public stream from the Bolotnaya Online open-source project.

item.title: Camera: Ulitsa Serafimovicha
item.description: Live camera toward Ulitsa Serafimovicha near Bolotnaya Square, Moscow.
